results.title: Tyran AI: The easiest way to apply AI to health data | Product Hunt
results.content:
Harsh Sinha
Tyran AI

Tyran AI

Thanks @jason123! Tyran can be used to develop both consumer-facing and professional healthcare apps, with the same features such as HRV analysis available for all users. We’re hoping this can be the start of bringing rapid intelligent health features to developers across the industry, regardless of scale!

Sohan Patil

Congrats on the launch! Love the health AI concept. How easy is it to integrate Tyran agents into existing health apps?

Elliott Yu

Congrats on the launch! Am I right that this includes auto integration of wearables? or how to analyze different HRV, sleep, and lab data from multiple users?

Kyriakos Eleftheriou
Terra

Terra

@elliott\_yu1 it helps you increase your bench from the plateau of half a plate
